description_long: This is a modern, flat-roofed house surrounded by landscaped elements including several medium-sized trees and large boulders. The house features a clean, white exterior with large windows and open balconies, providing a sense of openness and connection to the outdoors. The front area includes a small, organically shaped pool or water feature, enhancing the visual appeal and relaxation potential of the property. The structure appears to have two stories, with the upper level partially set back and featuring open terraces. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some large picture windows and others smaller, providing varied natural light to the interior. The entryway is understated, with a simple door and no prominent porch or overhang, emphasizing the minimalist architectural style.
description: A modern, two-story white house with flat roofs, large windows, and open balconies, surrounded by trees, boulders, and a small pool in front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry, large windows, open balconies, landscaped trees, boulders, and a small pool.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, upper terrace, and the arrangement of trees and boulders along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, more trees and boulders, and the setback of the upper story.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, trees, boulders, and the simple, windowed rear wall.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with a simple door, no porch or overhang, and direct access from the landscaped front area
